item.name: Agent UDP Port
item.description: The UDP port on which the SNMP agent listens

item.name: Agent TCP Port
item.description: The TCP port on which the SNMP agent listens.

item.name: Trap UDP Port
item.description: The UDP port on which the SNMP trap listens.

item.name: Trap TCP Port
item.description: The TCP port on which the SNMP trap listens.

item.name: Simulator Enabled
item.description: Whether the SNMP simulator is enabled.
